hero.title: Exit VMware Without Entering Another Lock-In
hero.subtitle: Govern VMware and AtomOS side by side. Migrate workload by workload with no forklift, no downtime windows, and no new dependency cycle.

painPoints.title: VMware Exit Challenges You Face
painPoints.subtitle: Why hypervisor swaps alone do not break the dependency cycle organisations face after Broadcom

items.title: Hypervisor Swap Only
items.description: Replacing VMware with another hypervisor addresses licensing but not the underlying dependency model.

items.title: Forklift Migration Risk
items.description: Big-bang migrations create downtime windows and operational risk across critical workloads.

items.title: New Lock-In Cycle
items.description: Switching vendors without a governance layer simply restarts the dependency cycle elsewhere.

items.title: Fragmented Control
items.description: Running mixed hypervisors without a unified control plane multiplies operational overhead.

solution.title: Elemento's VMware Exit Path
solution.description: Govern mixed hypervisor estates and migrate incrementally without entering a new dependency cycle.

items.name: Electros
items.description: Consistent control plane governing VMware, AtomOS, and third-party hypervisors from one console.

items.name: Atomosphere
items.description: Broker cloud and sovereign provider capacity without binding workloads to a single vendor.

items.name: Atomosquare
items.description: Operate legacy VMware, AtomOS, and third-party hypervisors under the same governance model.

items.name: AtomOS
items.description: Native sovereign execution engine for workloads ready to leave VMware behind.

useCase.title: VMware Exit Journey
useCase.subtitle: A structured approach with Elemento's Metacloud platform

items.title: Assess
items.description: Inventory VMware estates and classify workloads by migration readiness and sovereignty requirements.

items.title: Govern Side by Side
items.description: Connect VMware and AtomOS endpoints under Electros with Atomosquare bridging legacy environments.

items.title: Migrate Incrementally
items.description: Move workloads one at a time with consistent policies, monitoring, and rollback paths.

items.title: Decommission Safely
items.description: Retire VMware capacity as governance and operations fully shift to the Metacloud model.

stats.title: VMware Exit Impact
stats.subtitle: Real outcomes with the Metacloud platform

faq.title: VMware Exit FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about exiting VMware with the Metacloud

items.question: Do we need a forklift migration from VMware?
items.answer: No. Elemento is designed for side-by-side operation. Govern VMware and AtomOS together, then migrate workload by workload at your own pace.

items.question: How does Atomosquare help during VMware exit?
items.answer: Atomosquare connects VMware and other third-party hypervisors to Electros so you apply the same policies, monitoring, and access controls across all environments.

items.question: What happens to existing VMware investments during transition?
items.answer: You keep running VMware where needed while gradually shifting execution to AtomOS. No forced rip-and-replace timeline.

items.question: How is this different from switching to another proprietary hypervisor?
items.answer: Electros provides an organisation-wide control plane that is not tied to a single hypervisor or cloud. You gain portability instead of trading one lock-in for another.

ctaFinal.title: Ready for VMware Exit?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Govern VMware and AtomOS side by side, then migrate workload by workload at your own pace.

painPoints.title: Le sfide di Uscita da VMware
painPoints.subtitle: Perché il solo cambio hypervisor non rompe il ciclo di dipendenza dopo Broadcom

items.title: Solo cambio hypervisor
items.description: Sostituire VMware con un altro hypervisor risolve le licenze ma non il modello di dipendenza sottostante.

items.title: Rischio migrazione forklift
items.description: Le migrazioni big-bang creano finestre di downtime e rischio operativo sui workload critici.

items.title: Nuovo ciclo di lock-in
items.description: Cambiare vendor senza un layer di governance riavvia semplicemente il ciclo di dipendenza altrove.

items.title: Controllo frammentato
items.description: Eseguire hypervisor misti senza un control plane unificato moltiplica il carico operativo.

solution.title: Il percorso di uscita da VMware di Elemento
solution.description: Gestisci ambienti multi-hypervisor e migra in modo incrementale senza entrare in un nuovo ciclo di dipendenza.

items.name: Electros
items.description: Control plane coerente che governa VMware, AtomOS e hypervisor di terze parti da un'unica console.

items.name: Atomosphere
items.description: Intermedia capacità Cloud e provider sovrani senza legare i workload a un singolo vendor.

items.name: Atomosquare
items.description: Opera VMware legacy, AtomOS e hypervisor di terze parti sotto lo stesso modello di governance.

items.name: AtomOS
items.description: Motore di esecuzione sovrano nativo per i workload pronti a lasciare VMware.

stats.title: Impatto Uscita da VMware
stats.subtitle: Risultati concreti con la piattaforma Metacloud

faq.title: FAQ Uscita da VMware
faq.subtitle: Domande frequenti sull'uscita da VMware con il Metacloud

items.question: Serve una migrazione forklift da VMware?
items.answer: No. Elemento è progettato per l'operatività fianco a fianco. Gestisci VMware e AtomOS insieme, poi migra workload per workload al tuo ritmo.

items.question: Come aiuta Atomosquare durante l'uscita da VMware?
items.answer: Atomosquare collega VMware e altri hypervisor di terze parti a Electros per applicare le stesse policy, monitoraggio e controlli di accesso.

items.question: Cosa succede agli investimenti VMware esistenti?
items.answer: Continui a usare VMware dove serve mentre sposti gradualmente l'esecuzione su AtomOS. Nessuna timeline di rip-and-replace forzata.

items.question: In cosa differisce dal passare a un altro hypervisor proprietario?
items.answer: Electros fornisce un control plane a livello di organizzazione non legato a un singolo hypervisor o Cloud. Ottieni portabilità invece di scambiare un lock-in con un altro.

ctaFinal.title: Pronto per Uscita da VMware?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Gestisci VMware e AtomOS fianco a fianco, poi migra workload per workload al tuo ritmo.

painPoints.title: Les défis Sortie VMware
painPoints.subtitle: Pourquoi le simple remplacement d'hyperviseur ne brise pas le cycle de dépendance post-Broadcom

items.title: Simple remplacement d'hyperviseur
items.description: Remplacer VMware par un autre hyperviseur règle les licences mais pas le modèle de dépendance sous-jacent.

items.title: Risque de migration massive
items.description: Les migrations massives créent des fenêtres d'arrêt et des risques opérationnels sur les charges critiques.

items.title: Nouveau cycle de verrouillage
items.description: Changer de fournisseur sans couche de gouvernance relance simplement le cycle de dépendance ailleurs.

items.title: Contrôle fragmenté
items.description: Faire coexister des hyperviseurs sans plan de contrôle unifié multiplie la charge opérationnelle.

solution.title: Le parcours de sortie VMware d'Elemento
solution.description: Gouvernez des environnements multi-hyperviseurs et migrez progressivement sans nouveau cycle de dépendance.

items.name: Electros
items.description: Plan de contrôle cohérent gouvernant VMware, AtomOS et les hyperviseurs tiers depuis une seule console.

items.name: Atomosphere
items.description: Intermédiez la capacité Cloud et les fournisseurs souverains sans lier les charges à un seul fournisseur.

items.name: Atomosquare
items.description: Faites coexister VMware existant, AtomOS et hyperviseurs tiers sous le même modèle de gouvernance.

items.name: AtomOS
items.description: Moteur d'exécution souverain natif pour les charges prêtes à quitter VMware.

stats.title: Impact Sortie VMware
stats.subtitle: Résultats concrets avec la plateforme Metacloud

faq.title: FAQ Sortie VMware
faq.subtitle: Questions fréquentes sur la sortie VMware avec le Metacloud

items.question: Faut-il une migration massive depuis VMware ?
items.answer: Non. Elemento est conçu pour une exploitation côte à côte. Gouvernez VMware et AtomOS ensemble, puis migrez charge par charge à votre rythme.

items.question: Comment Atomosquare aide-t-il lors de la sortie VMware ?
items.answer: Atomosquare connecte VMware et d'autres hyperviseurs tiers à Electros pour appliquer les mêmes politiques, supervision et contrôles d'accès.

items.question: Qu'advient-il des investissements VMware existants ?
items.answer: Vous continuez VMware là où c'est nécessaire tout en déplaçant progressivement l'exécution vers AtomOS.

items.question: En quoi est-ce différent d'un autre hyperviseur propriétaire ?
items.answer: Electros fournit un plan de contrôle à l'échelle de l'organisation, indépendant d'un hyperviseur ou Cloud unique. Vous gagnez en portabilité.

ctaFinal.title: Prêt pour Sortie VMware ?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Gouvernez VMware et AtomOS côte à côte, puis migrez charge par charge à votre rythme.
